floors.coordinate_target: z=(log A, log k, log sigma)
floors.method: Posterior-centered adaptive Gauss-Hermite evidence integration, order 13.
Monte Carlo over p(theta)p(x|theta); closed-form theta1 evidence with tail quadrature and conjugate Gaussian theta2 posterior.
Raw sign-symmetry floor minus log(2), because the posterior sign is exactly symmetric.

note: Entropy floors are coordinate-specific density losses. Compare an NPE validation NLL only with the floor for the same density target parameterization.
